title: Harbinger
description: Horror mod that adds starving creatures that will hunt you down.
body:
![logo of the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/93e99e6594eb7585807b2910947d724b59895972.png) WARNING: MOD DOESN'T WORK IN MULTIPLAYER CORRECTLY, AND ALSO HAS LOUD SOUNDS.
**About the mod** Harbinger is a horror mod that adds 12 different zombie/mutant like entites that will stalk you and try to kill you. They all hunger for flesh, to survive for at least a bit longer, and you are their target. **Features it adds** This mod adds: - 12 Different Entities that all are hungry for flesh. - 29 Blocks you can find in the world. - 14 Items that can help you create tools. - 4 Weapons that allow you to defend yourself. - 2 Dream like dimensions you can access. **More detailed list of features! [ SPOILER WARNING ]**
Spoiler ** Entities:** - Harbinger: a zombie like entity that stalks you and tries to hunt you down. - Conductor: a spirit of a tortured soul, trying to get revenge. - Dust Devil: a being that lives in the skies, attacking anyone who enters it's domain. - Traitor: an entity that pretends to be innocent animals, attacking anyone who falls for it's bait. - Hungry Fish: a sea creature, starved to near death, attempting to find any food source. - The Parasites: a hivemind of spider like creatures that live underground. - The Void Feeder: an eldrich, demonic entity from another land summoned by a cult, it now lives in the underground and hunts down anything that can breath. - Gluttony: a spirit of eternal hunger, attacking prey while it cannot run or hide. - Trauma: a spirit of pure horror, agony and pain, summoned during the worst of time. - The Judgment: a spirit of karma, haunting anyone who has done terrible things. - The Death Angel: a spirit of death appearing in the last moments. - The [       ]: ** Items + Weapons:** - The Shotgun - The Shotgun piece - Shotgun Shell - Upgraded Shotgun Shell - Devil Dust - Dust Necklace - Cave Star - Survival Knife - Upgraded Survival Knife - Cursed Gold Ingot - The Trap - Key 1 - Key 2 - Key 3 ** Dimensions:** - The Dream - Eternal Caverns
**Extra** You can open the settings menu by pressing H. This mod is inspired by "From the caves", "Mark101", "Alpha000" and "Cryptid". Keep in mind, this mod is still in development, and will get improved over time.
